_meta.author: tgd1975
_meta.tested: Windows 11, OBS Studio 30.x / macOS 14, OBS Studio 30.x

profiles.name: 01 Scene Switcher
profiles.description: Foot-operated scene switcher for OBS Studio. Uses high-range function keys (F13–F16) to switch scenes or toggle audio without interfering with standard typing. In OBS go to Settings > Hotkeys and bind: Intro Scene → F13, Main Scene → F14, Mute Mic → F15, Start/Stop Stream → F16.
